name: Chocolate Chip Cookie Mix for a Crowd
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly combine the dry ingredients: flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. Cut in the shortening until the mixture is crumbly.
3. Store the cookie mix in an airtight container in a cool, dry place for up to 6 months.
To Make Cookies:
4. Combine the cookie mix, vanilla extract, and beaten eggs; stir well.
5. Fold in the semisweet chocolate chips.
6. Drop tablespoonfuls of dough about half an inch apart onto greased baking sheets.
7. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Remove from the pans and cool on wire racks.
Yield: 2 dozen cookies per batch
Source: Taste of Home magazine
